title: Exotic Elegant Dutch Kiwifruit Tart
description: A tangy and creamy dutch dessert featuring kiwifruit, perfect for special occasions, and friendly to those with egg allergies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pie crust and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks.
In a separate bowl, mix together the confectioners sugar, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Arrange the sliced kiwifruit in a pattern on the pie crust.
Pour the sugar and cream mixture over the kiwifruit.
Bake the tart for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Allow the tart to cool completely before serving.
Slice the tart into 8 equal pieces and serve chilled.
